name: QA 1696
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1696

Valgrind pmproxy REST API load testing.

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1696

Valgrind pmproxy REST API load testing.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce
